description.long: CEO Taste Validation reviews plans with founder-mode product thinking. Challenges premises, explores 10x opportunities, can expand or reduce scope. Three modes: EXPANSION (dream big, find platonic ideal), HOLD SCOPE (maximum rigor, bulletproof plan), REDUCTION (ruthless cut to essentials). Uses 2-phase workflow: Pre-Review System Audit + Nuclear Scope Challenge, then 10-section review.

triggers: When user asks for 'CEO review' or 'founder review'
Architecture decisions with unclear product direction
User says 'should we build X?' (premise challenge needed)
User says 'go big' or 'ambitious' or 'cathedral' (EXPANSION mode)

performance.notes: Skeleton ~800 tokens, references loaded on-demand (0-5,000 additional tokens depending on sections needed)

maintenance.refactoring_notes: v2.0.0: Refactored to workflow skeleton pattern (44% token reduction vs v1.0.0 monolithic version). References loaded lazily.
